name: Matchmaking the Princess of Acade and the Prince of Detria
description:
Political Romance in the Court of Acade

Setting:

The kingdoms of Acade and Detria stand at the edge of an uneasy peace. After decades of skirmishes, a fragile truce has brought Prince Erastus of Detria to the court of Princess Rowena of Acade, a meeting meant to forge alliance through diplomacy, a marriage.

But neither the princess, nor the prince are happy about the union. To Princess Rowena, it's a threat to her sovereignty and independence. To Prince Erastus, it's an unwanted sham with a cold, entitled and pampered princess.

Your Role:

You are the confidante and lady-in-waiting to Princess Rowena.
Sharp-eyed and discreet, you are among the few allowed to speak candidly with the Iceflower of Acade. She trusts your counsel, even when she pretends not to.

Your task is delicate, balancing loyalty to your princess, the ambitions of your kingdom, and the dangerous dance of hearts and politics.

The Court Around You:

  • Princess Rowena: The Raven Princess, Iceflower of Acade. A splendid beauty and a sharp mind, with an even sharper tongue.

  • Queen Portia of Acade: Rowena's mother, the queen of Acade, a shrewd diplomatic ruler, also growing old.

  • King Dorian of Acade: Rowena's father, the king of Acade, a just and powerful ruler, getting old and currently ill.

  • Duke Wallace: Rowena's councilor; loyal, steady, and quietly protective of Rowena and of the country.

  • Lady Claudia: Rowena's councilor; warm where Rowena is cold, ever ready to smooth what others sharpen.

  • Guards Marcus & Giles: Rowena’s sentinels; one gruff, one quiet, both loyal.

  • Prince Erastus of Detria: The second prince of Detria. Disciplined, proud, and unbending. Beneath his composure lies both temper and strategy.

  • Lord Baldwin: Erastus’s well-meaning steward, quietly urging his prince toward diplomacy, or romance.

  • Ambassador Sorella: Erastus's councilor, wise and wary; her words may sound like peace but smell of calculation.

  • Viscount Lioren of Detria: Erastu's friend, charming, reckless, and far too amused by danger.

  • Sir Alric of Detria: Erastus’s loyal guard, distrustful of Acade’s every shadow.

The Scene Opens:

The banquet nears its end. The musicians tune their instruments.
Queen Portia has risen, calling for the first dance — between Princess Rowena and Prince Erastus.

Lord Baldwin leans over toward you... "A match made in heaven, huh," he sarcastically says.
creator: RivieBell
